theme: Light Theme (with Dark Green dominance for accents and hero)

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-[#022c22]
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-[#022c22]

cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-[#e2e8f0] p-6 transition-all duration-200
cards.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-2xl p-6

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-r from-[#064e3b] to-[#10b981] px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold text-white shadow-sm hover:from-[#047857] hover:to-[#34d399] transition-all duration-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#10b981] focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-white px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold text-[#064e3b] shadow-sm border border-[#e2e8f0] hover:bg-gray-50 transition-all duration-200
buttons.outline: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg border-2 border-[#10b981] px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold text-[#064e3b] hover:bg-[#10b981]/10 transition-all duration-200

inputs.base: w-full rounded-lg border border-gray-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-900 focus:border-[#10b981] focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#10b981]

badges.draft: bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.pending: bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.approved: bg-green-100 text-green-800 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.rejected: bg-red-100 text-red-800 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

public_home.hero: Split layout or centered text over a clean modern background. Heavy use of the dark green to light green gradient for CTA and typography accents. Include glassmorphism floating cards for stats (e.g. 'Akreditasi A').
public_home.features: Bento grid layout for Highlights, Vision, Mission. Asymmetrical spacing with generous padding.
public_home.news_events: Grid of news cards. Generous spacing (gap-8). Minimalist date badges.
public_home.teacher_grid: Grid of teacher portraits. Use image zoom on hover.
public_home.gallery: Grid with overlapping images, varied heights (masonry or bento) for album.

auth_login.layout: Split screen (desktop). Left side: Beautiful green gradient bg-gradient-to-br from-[#064e3b] to-[#10b981] with dynamic abstract glass shapes and school branding. Right side: White background with login form centered.
auth_login.form: Clean input fields with subtle borders. Primary gradient button taking full width.

admin_dashboard.layout: Sidebar (Dark Green #064e3b) + Top header (White, Glassy) layout.
admin_dashboard.branding: CRITICAL: The logo and school name in the Sidebar/Header must pull from a global context/state that is editable in Settings.
admin_dashboard.settings_panel: Dedicated settings page to upload a new Logo URL and School Name string. This updates the global branding via state management.
admin_dashboard.data_tables: Use Shadcn Table components with action dropdowns, bulk select checkboxes, and distinct row hover states.

teacher_dashboard.layout: Same sidebar/header layout as Admin, but restricted navigation.
teacher_dashboard.grades_ui: Spreadsheet-like dense table for grade input. Use Shadcn Table with minimal padding (p-1 or p-2) for dense data entry.

osis_dashboard.layout: Same layout. Focus on card-based submissions and status badges (pending/approved) in lists.

images.description: Modern Islamic architecture tower, green elements

interactive_rules.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='submit-login-btn').
interactive_rules.animations: Use Framer Motion for page transitions. Stagger list items in bento grids.
interactive_rules.hover_states: Always ensure text contrast remains accessible on hover. Buttons must lighten slightly on hover.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard React with React Router DOM for routing.
Store the branding context (logo + school name) using React Context API or Zustand. Set default name to 'MA PULOSARI' and logo to default_logo provided.
Implement the gradient green as a core utility class and apply it heavily on Hero components and primary buttons.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for Headings and Plus Jakarta Sans for Body. Add custom font classes to Tailwind.
Implement Shadcn UI for standard components but override classes to inject glassmorphism where specified in cards.glass component logic.
DO NOT use raw <input> or <select>, always use Shadcn variants.
Ensure the Admin Settings page has a form that actually updates the Context state for Branding, so changes reflect immediately across the sidebar and header.
Build a robust sidebar navigation for dashboards with the Dark Green background.
